message:
chore(gitignore): ignore root-level fix_*.sh sed-refactor scratch scripts

`AGENTS.md` for this repo (and the shared ACFS AGENTS.md) explicitly
forbid running scripts that mutate code files — brittle regex / sed
transformations create far more problems than they solve. In
practice those scripts still get generated locally when an agent
tries to take a shortcut, and they end up as dirty untracked files
at the repo root (e.g. `fix_test_locks.sh` earlier in this session).

Add a root-anchored `/fix_*.sh` ignore pattern so the scratch
scripts stop showing up in `git status` and can't be swept up by
`git add .`. Scoped with a leading `/` so scripts living under
`scripts/fix_*.sh` (if any ever legitimately exist) are unaffected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,6 +128,11 @@ sample_beads_db_files/**/*.db-wal
 /child.json
 /parent.json
 
+# One-off sed-based refactor helper scripts (see AGENTS.md — never run scripts
+# that mutate code files; these are agent-generated dev scratch and must stay
+# out of the repo).
+/fix_*.sh
+
 # Beads snapshot backups (timestamped)
 .beads.snapshot_*/
